# Redwood Summit

> Premium short-term rental lodges in Rotorua, New Zealand, built for mountain bikers and located directly next to the Whakarewarewa Redwoods trail network. Two properties: Redwood Summit Lodge (flagship, sleeps 8+, for MTB crews and teams) and Redwood Summit Cottage (family-oriented). Opening 2027.

## Location

- Rotorua, Bay of Plenty, New Zealand
- Within the Redwood Park development
- Directly adjacent to Whakarewarewa Forest (the "Redwoods")
- Home of Crankworx Rotorua and 180+ km of world-class MTB trails

## Properties

- [Redwood Summit Lodge](https://redwoodsummit.nz/lodge): Premium residence designed for mountain bike crews, teams, and enthusiasts. Sleeps 8+. Features secure bike vault, workshop-grade wash station, hot spa recovery lounge, forest-framed living spaces. Final bedroom/bathroom configuration TBD.
- [Redwood Summit Cottage](https://redwoodsummit.nz/cottage): Family-oriented residence with direct forest access. Final configuration TBD.

## Key Amenities

- Secure bike vault (on-site, lockable)
- Bike wash station with tools, stands, lighting
- Outdoor hot spa for post-ride recovery
- Direct trail access to Whakarewarewa Forest
- Floor-to-ceiling forest views
- Sleeps 8+ at the Lodge

## Trails & Context

- [The Trails](https://redwoodsummit.nz/trails): Whakarewarewa Forest ("the Redwoods") — 180+ km of trails across all grades (green through double black), host of Crankworx Rotorua, volcanic loamy soil, celebrated globally.

## Booking

- Status: Not yet open — opening 2027.
- Register interest via: hello@redwoodsummit.nz
- Will list on Airbnb but direct bookings prioritized with rider-first pricing.
- Rates: Inquire for rates and availability.

## Links

- Home: https://redwoodsummit.nz/
- The Lodge: https://redwoodsummit.nz/lodge
- The Cottage: https://redwoodsummit.nz/cottage
- The Trails: https://redwoodsummit.nz/trails
